title: TelemetryPayload
description: Per-(run,item,sample) telemetry as actually emitted by runner._build_telemetry and persisted by storage.save_telemetry. Honesty is enforced: a metric that the provider does not expose is null AND named in `unobservable_fields` with the reason -- never reported as zero. Token-entropy fields are populated only on a provider that returns logprobs (open-weights via vLLM/TGI); Tree-of-Thought branch mapping and intra-reasoning token rate are physically unobservable when the hosted chain-of-thought is omitted, and stay null+annotated.

capabilities.description: Provider capability flags, e.g. native_anthropic, logprobs.

reasoning_token_source.description: native_usage when the provider returns a thinking-token count; else unavailable.

reasoning_tokens.description: 0 when not exposed by the provider.

reasoning_density_proxy.description: (completion - answer_estimate)/answer_estimate; null without a reasoning-token count.

reasoning_wall_ms.description: answer_wall - ttft; lower bound on wall-clock reasoning under display:omitted.

answer_wall_ms.description: time from request start to first answer token.

token_entropy_mean.description: MEASURED only with provider logprobs: mean per-token H(X) over the renormalized top-k distribution (bits).

token_entropy_max.description: max per-token entropy (bits); null without logprobs.

friction_transitions.description: tokens whose entropy exceeds mean+2*std (high-friction calculation vs smooth memorized generation); null without logprobs.

logprob_divergence_spikes.description: tokens whose chosen-token logprob < -2.0 (committed to a low-probability token); null without logprobs.

unobservable_fields.description: Per-metric provenance for everything NOT measured on this provider. Keys present here MUST be read as 'not collected', never as zero.
